titlestmt.titleproper: School of Hotel Administration photographs and ephemera28-10-4164
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-11-27 18:20:50 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: School of Hotel Administration photographs and ephemera

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration

did.abstract: Includes photographs, publications and newspaper clippings concerning the Statler Hotel and School of Hotel Administration.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs, publications and newspaper clippings concerning the Statler Hotel and School of Hotel Administration.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: See also the research material collected for the book Hospitality Leadership: Cornell Hotel School, #28-12-3774.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series IV. "Life is Service" History of the Hotel School written in 1995 Boxes 2

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: School of Hotel Administration Photographs and Ephemera, #28-10-4164. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Hospitality industry.
Hotel management schools -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.

did.unittitle: Student body in front of the new Statler Hall
Newspapers clippings, publications and programs, about the Hotel School
Newspapers clippings and publications about the Hotel School
Newspapers clippings and publications about the Hotel School
Newspapers clippings and publications about the Hotel School, including 1989 issue of "The Statler Times"
Newspapers Clippings and Publications about the Hotel School, including the first issue of the student newsletter "The Statler Times"
Newspapers Clippings and Publications pertaining to the Hotel School Campaign
Hotel School Scholarship Assistance, including Industry Cooperative Scholarship Program
Hotel Staff Organization and Expense Distribution
Correspondence from Alumni who donated items and 1961 Speech given by unidentified person
Hotel School 50th Anniversary - Invitations, Programs, Correspondence
Drinking glass with "Statler" engraved on it

Buildings (Statler Hall and Hotel), Classes, People, Events, Associations, pertaining to the Hotel School
First Class in Hotel Administration to Graduate
Troy Photographs of the Hotel School - Faculty and Students, two different photos, including one with Martha Van Rensselaer (2 copies)
Eleventh Annual Dinner of the Buffalo Hotel Association in the Lafayette Hotel
Luncheon of the Visiting Hotelmen at the Hotel Pennsylvania in New York (2 copies)
Luncheon (2 copies) of the Visiting Hotelmen at the Hotel Pennsylvania in New York
Luncheon that appears to have taken place at Cornell
Annual Dinner Cornell Society of Hotelmen at the Hotel Lincoln
Student Body Assembled on the Steps of Bailey Hall
Cornell Society of Hotelmen - Waldorf Astoria
Items from Scrapbook of Helen Tetter Kennedy
Headquarters for Pacific Coast Hotel Men's Club

Professor Charles Sayles, John Larkin, Fred Mills
Statler Inn Lounge and Main Dining Room
Professor and Mrs. Elizabeth Toth; Commercial Gas Breakfast with Howard Meek
New York Hotel Reception with Dean Meek, Lee Schoenbrunn, John Borhman and Adrian Phillips
Groundbreaking for Statler Auditorium, including Deane Malott, Howard Meek and Alice Statler
Cornell Society of Hotelmen - Waldorf Astoria
Annual Cornell Smoker - Hilton Statler Hotel
Banquet at Princess Kaiulani Hotel, J.B. Herndon, donated Recipe Collection
Summer Session and Various Other Group Photos
Burton Sack and Dean Robert Beck - Scholarship Presentation
Professor John and Mrs. Peggy Sherry and Mary Wright
William Wallace Dietz Memorial Scholarship Awards Presentation
Vance Christian - Villa Banfi Professor of Wine Education
Classrooms, Student Lounge, Faculty - Contact Sheets
Hotelie of the Year Award Banquet
Peter Plaza Dedication, Hercules sculpture by Seeley
Wine Library with David Milligan and Professor Stephen Mutkoski
Photographs of Robert Beck, Founding Director of IMHI
CDs of photos of various events, programs, people, buildings, etc.
CDs of photos of various events, programs, people, buildings, etc.
CDs of photos of various events, programs, people, buildings, etc.
Statler Renovation, Events, Faculty and Staff, Students, Classes, Buildings, Facilities, Exteriors
Series IV. "Life is Service" History of the Hotel School written in 1995
Correspondence, Drafts of the book "Life of Service"
Correspondence from Alumni, including memorabilia collected for the writing of the book
